prompt: I want to start a weekly newsletter about AI tools for non-technical managers
assertions: Questions are clearly delineated with one concept per question, not walls of text
At least 2 questions surface topics the initial prompt did not mention
Later questions reference or build on earlier answers
At least 1 question challenges an assumption or pushes back on the idea
The interview explicitly addresses what is NOT in scope
Final spec has clear sections including problem, scope, and success criteria
Key decisions are documented with rationale, not just listed
Spec identifies risks or open questions that remain unresolved
